disclaimer: Sources: Official government websites, Press Information Bureau, Reserve Bank of India. Always verify from official sources.

entries.fact: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Jayanti celebrated across India. President laid wreath at Parliament House.
RBI keeps repo rate unchanged at 6.0% in April 2026 MPC meeting. GDP growth projected at 6.7% for FY27.
SBI launches 'SBI Digi Plus' — a fully digital savings account with zero minimum balance for rural India.
India elected as non-permanent member of UN Security Council for 2027-28 term with highest votes.
ISRO successfully launches Chandrayaan-4 mission to collect and return lunar soil samples to Earth.
National Film Awards 2025 announced — 'Laapataa Ladies' wins Best Hindi Film, Aamir Khan gets Special Jury Award.
Indian Navy commissions INS Arighat — India's second nuclear-powered ballistic missile submarine (SSBN).
India wins Thomas Cup 2026 for first time in history, defeating Indonesia 3-2 in the final.
India's total installed solar capacity crosses 200 GW milestone — now 3rd globally after China and USA.
India's forex reserves reach $685 billion — highest ever. Rupee strengthens to 82.4 against USD.
Supreme Court upholds validity of EWS reservation (103rd Amendment) in a 3:2 majority verdict.
SEBI introduces T+0 settlement for top 500 stocks from April 2026. India becomes first major market with same-day settlement.
entries.source: Securities and Exchange Board of India

entries.fact: PM Modi visits Germany for India-EU FTA talks. Both sides agree on 90% tariff elimination by 2028.
IIT Madras develops India's first indigenous quantum computer with 50 qubits — named 'Qubit Bharat'.
HAL delivers first batch of LCA Tejas Mk2 to Indian Air Force. Total order is 97 aircraft.
Padma Awards 2026 — 7 Padma Vibhushan, 19 Padma Bhushan, and 113 Padma Shri awards announced by President.
Neeraj Chopra throws 90.12m at Diamond League Doha — sets new Asian record in javelin throw.
India overtakes Japan to become world's 4th largest economy with $4.18 trillion GDP (IMF data).
Project Cheetah Phase 2: 12 more South African cheetahs released in Gandhi Sagar Wildlife Sanctuary, Madhya Pradesh.
entries.source: Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change

entries.fact: Delimitation Commission submits final report — 543 Lok Sabha seats redistributed based on 2025 Census data.
UPI transactions in March 2026 cross 18 billion — monthly transaction value exceeds ₹24 lakh crore.
BRICS New Development Bank approves $2 billion green energy fund. India to receive $500 million for solar projects.
DRDO successfully tests hypersonic cruise missile 'Shaurya-2' with range of 1,500 km from Odisha coast.
India conducts first successful test of indigenous ballistic missile defence system 'Prithvi Air Defence' interceptor.
GST collection in March 2026 hits ₹2.10 lakh crore — highest ever single month collection.
New Criminal Laws — BNS, BNSS, BSA — complete 2 years of implementation. Conviction rate rises to 68%.
RBI launches 'Digital Rupee 2.0' with offline payment capability using NFC — works without internet.
India's FY26 GDP growth finalized at 7.0% — fastest among G20 economies for 3rd consecutive year.
India's first manned space mission Gaganyaan completes uncrewed test flight G1 — splash down in Bay of Bengal.
Indian women's cricket team wins inaugural Women's T20 Champions Trophy beating Australia in the final.
India announces 2030 Net Zero target for government buildings. All new govt construction to be GRIHA 5-star rated.
India-Middle East-Europe Economic Corridor (IMEC) begins operations — first cargo ship departs from Mundra Port.
Indian Army inducts first regiment of indigenous Pinaka Mark-II multi-barrel rocket launchers.
Account Aggregator ecosystem crosses 100 million linked accounts — revolutionizing credit access in India.
Election Commission announces dates for 5 state assembly elections — Assam, Kerala, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal, Puducherry.
Bhagat Singh's 95th Martyrdom Day. Government announces posthumous Bharat Ratna for Shaheed Bhagat Singh.
